## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content marketing services to Overtime and explore potential collaboration opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Overtime is experiencing a dip in organic traffic since spring, potentially due to the shift towards AI search](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [GrowthX offers a comprehensive strategy for optimizing content for AI search, including deep research and expert-driven workflows](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Overtime is interested in AI-powered content creation but cautious about maintaining brand integrity](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [Both parties agree to follow up with a more focused discussion on how GrowthX's services could apply to Overtime's specific use case (e.g., basketball shorts)](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)

## Topics

### AI Search Optimization

  - [AI search is disrupting traditional SEO and content marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
  - [GrowthX focuses on creating high-quality, audience-first content to appear in AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [AI search visits are 4.4x more likely to convert compared to traditional search (SEMrush data)](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Overtime has seen organic traffic decline since spring, potentially due to this shift](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)

### GrowthX's Approach

  - [Two-phase partnership: 8-week strategy sprint followed by growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Create artifacts like company context, audience personas, and voice/brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Use sophisticated AI workflows with expert oversight for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Offer end-to-end services from strategy to content creation and CMS publishing](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)

### Overtime's Current Strategy

  - [Limited optimization for search (e.g., basic product naming on TikTok Shop)](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [Main awareness drivers are leagues and social media platforms](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [No traditional brand awareness studies conducted](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)

### Potential Application for Overtime

  - [Explore creating website content (not necessarily a blog) to connect with search queries](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
  - [Consider developing thought leadership content or expanding social media strategy](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Investigate how to position Overtime's products against competitors like Nike, Adidas, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)

### GrowthX's Workflow and Tools

  - [Detailed research process including keyword analysis, SERP factors, and competitor content](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [AI-powered brief generation and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Agentic researcher for executing and validating research questions](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to discuss Overtime's use case (basketball shorts) with the GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide initial thoughts on applying their process to Overtime's products](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up conversation to discuss more focused strategies for Overtime](https://fathom.video/share/aqDGmVEDzrZu-RxqxyQ7xr1rTFNzWDua?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
